title: Chapter 22: Hypothetical Conditionals
description: Talk about what would happen in hypothetical situations.

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera tiempo, vendría.
sentences.english: If I had time, I would come.

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera dinero, compraría el libro.
sentences.english: If I had money, I would buy the book.

sentences.spanish: Si estudiaras más, aprenderías más.
sentences.english: If you studied more, you would learn more.

sentences.spanish: Si trabajaras menos, descansarías más.
sentences.english: If you worked less, you would rest more.

sentences.spanish: Si comieras mejor, dormirías mejor.
sentences.english: If you ate better, you would sleep better.

sentences.spanish: Si bebieras agua, estarías mejor.
sentences.english: If you drank water, you would feel better.

sentences.spanish: Si llegaras temprano, hablaríamos más.
sentences.english: If you arrived early, we would talk more.

sentences.spanish: Si llegaras tarde, no comeríamos juntos.
sentences.english: If you arrived late, we wouldn't eat together.

sentences.spanish: Si vinieras mañana, iríamos al café.
sentences.english: If you came tomorrow, we would go to the café.

sentences.spanish: Si fueras hoy, comprarías el pan.
sentences.english: If you went today, you would buy the bread.

sentences.spanish: Si abrieras la puerta, entraría.
sentences.english: If you opened the door, he/she would come in.

sentences.spanish: Si cerraras la ventana, estaría mejor.
sentences.english: If you closed the window, it would be better.

sentences.spanish: Si me escucharas, entenderías.
sentences.english: If you listened to me, you would understand.

sentences.spanish: Si me dijeras la verdad, te ayudaría.
sentences.english: If you told me the truth, I would help you.

sentences.spanish: Si me lo dijeras, lo entendería.
sentences.english: If you told it to me, I would understand it.

sentences.spanish: Si lo compraras hoy, sería más barato.
sentences.english: If you bought it today, it would be cheaper.

sentences.spanish: Si la compraras hoy, sería más barata.
sentences.english: If you bought it today, it would be cheaper.

sentences.spanish: Si los compraras hoy, sería mejor.
sentences.english: If you bought them today, it would be better.

sentences.spanish: Si las compraras hoy, sería mejor.
sentences.english: If you bought them today, it would be better.

sentences.spanish: Si estuvieras aquí, te vería.
sentences.english: If you were here, I would see you.

sentences.spanish: Si no estuvieras aquí, no te vería.
sentences.english: If you weren't here, I wouldn't see you.

sentences.spanish: Si fueras paciente, todo sería más fácil.
sentences.english: If you were patient, everything would be easier.

sentences.spanish: Si fueras amable, él hablaría contigo.
sentences.english: If you were kind, he would speak with you.

sentences.spanish: Si pudiera, iría ahora.
sentences.english: If I could, I would go now.

sentences.spanish: Si no pudiera, iría mañana.
sentences.english: If I couldn't, I would go tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Si quisiera, hablaría.
sentences.english: If I wanted, I would speak.

sentences.spanish: Si quisieras, abriría la puerta.
sentences.english: If you wanted, I would open the door.

sentences.spanish: Si lloviera, me quedaría en casa.
sentences.english: If it rained, I would stay at home.

sentences.spanish: Si hiciera sol, iríamos al centro.
sentences.english: If it were sunny, we would go downtown.

sentences.spanish: Si vinieras conmigo, estaría contento.
sentences.english: If you came with me, I would be happy.

grammarExplanation:
Hypothetical (unreal) conditionals describe imaginary situations. They use the imperfect subjunctive + conditional:

'Si + imperfect subjunctive, conditional'

Imperfect subjunctive (-ra form):
• -AR: hablara, hablaras, hablara, habláramos, hablaran
• -ER/-IR: comiera, comieras, comiera, comiéramos, comieran

Conditional:
• -ía, -ías, -ía, -íamos, -ían

• Si tuviera tiempo, vendría = If I had time, I would come.
